title: neottia macrantha
intro: Neottia macrantha, commonly known as the large-flowered toothwort, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Neottia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neottia macrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Neottia macrantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
